title: Ali-Monde
description: Ali-Monde is a food production and distribution company that's been around for over 50 years. They've got 5 of their own brands and an impressive lineup of 800+ dry, organic, and gluten-free products. Based just south of Montreal, they distribute food across Quebec, Ontario, New Brunswick, and parts of Western Canada. Ali-Monde is all about giving customers exactly what they want - tasty, diverse food products that meet different dietary needs.
